title: Definitions of TESDA and Underage Migrant Workers
content:
(uu) TESDA - Technical Education and Skills Development Authority

(vv) Underage Migrant Workers - refer to those who are below 18 years or below the minimum age requirement for overseas employment as determined by the Secretary of Labor and Employment.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
